verses.text: “Aaron, ama tapate, leh Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in. Hih pen Topa' thupiaksa thu ahi hi
Israel mi khatpeuh in bawngtal ahi a, tuuno ahi a, keel ahi zongin giahphual sung ahi a, giahphual pua-ah ahi zongin go a

Topa' biakbuk mai, Topa' tungah letsongin piak dingin kikhopna bukkongah a gawh kei leh, tua mipa thu palsat hi ding hi. Amah in sisan luangsak ahih manin ama mite' lak panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi

Hih pen, gamlakah Israel mite in a gawh uh amau' biakpiaknate hong paipih theihna ding, kikhopna buk kongkhak-a siampipa' kiang, Topa' tungah amaute in tuate hong paipih theihna ding, leh thunuama biakpiakna-in Topa tungah sa hong gawh theihna ding uh deihna ahi hi
Siampipa in kikhopna buk kong-a Topa' biakna tau tungah a si thehin, Topa' tungah a gim namtui dingin a thau hal ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a biak uh keeldawite-a' dingin amau' biakpiaknate go nawnlo ding uh hi. Hih pen amau' khang tawntungin amaute' tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi

“Nangmah in amaute tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: Israel mite sung pan hita leh, amaute lakah a peem khualmite sung panin hita leh meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin a pia mipa in Topa' tungah piak dingin kikhopna bukkongah a paipih kei leh, ama mipihte kiang panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi.
“Israel mite sung pan hita leh amau' lakah a peem khualmite sung pan hita leh mi khat in si khat peuhpeuh a nek leh, si a ne mipa ka maisiat ding a, ama mite lak panin amah ka khenkhia ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi nuntakna pen si sungah om hi. Note-a' ding kilemna bawlna dingin note-a' dingin biakna tau tungah tua si ka piazo hi. Si pen nuntakna ahih manin kilemna a piangsak na ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin keimah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin hi: Note lakah kuamah in si nelo ding a, note lakah a hong peem khualmi khatpeuh in zong si nelo ding hi

“Israel mite khatpeuh hita leh, amaute lakah a peem khualmi khatpeuh hita leh in zong, sabetna-ah, a kine thei ding gamsa khatpeuh hita leh vasa hita leh a manpa in a si buakhia-in leivui tawh vuk ding hi

Ganhing khempeuh' nuntakna pen a si ahih manin Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khinzo hi: Ganhing khat peuhpeuh si na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing khempeuh' nuntakna pen a si ahi hi. Si a ne mi peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi

“A mawk sih hita leh gamsate in a balgawp hita leh a ne mi peuhmah, tualsung mi hita leh peemta hita leh tua mi in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a, tua khit ciangin amah siang ding hi
Ahih hangin amah in tuate sawploin ahi zongin, kisil loin ahi zongin a om leh, amah in ama mawhna pua ding hi,” a ci hi.
